info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Management API
info.description: The Transaction Management API facilitates the creation and handling of financial transactions within the system. It allows users to register new transactions, ensuring accurate tracking and reporting. Ideal for developers building applications that require seamless transaction processing, this API supports various operations pertinent to business transactions, including validation and status updates. Typical consumers include financial institutions, e-commerce platforms, and accounting software providers seeking to integrate comprehensive transaction functionalities.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to create a new transaction. It involves sending the necessary transaction details in the request body, which will be processed to record the transaction in the system.

requestBody.description: This request body is intended for creating new transactions. It must contain the necessary data to perform the transaction operation, including all relevant details as defined in the schema.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transactions POST Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A more detailed message describing the specific error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that was called.

trace.description: A stack trace or additional debugging information related to the error.

details.description: Additional details about the error, providing context and information.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how the user might correct the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of the error response returned when a POST operation on transactions fails.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

accountNumber.description: The account number associated with the error.

accountType.description: The type of account that triggered the error.

errorCode.description: A code representing the specific error.

message.description: A message describing the error in the context of the details.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Schema representing additional details related to the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

transactionId.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number associated with the transaction.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., credit, debit).

amount.description: The amount involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction amount is represented.

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending).

processedAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was processed.

paymentMode.description: The mode of payment used for the transaction (e.g., credit card, bank transfer).

message.description: Additional information or message regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the response structure for a successful transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

accountNumber.description: The account number associated with the transaction.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., debit or credit).

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is made (e.g., USD, EUR).

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary.

transactionDate.description: The date of the transaction in ISO 8601 format.

paymentMode.description: The mode of payment used (e.g., online, cheque).

remarks.description: Additional remarks or comments regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a transaction.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates the status of the operation.

error.description: A brief description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message providing more context about the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: An optional trace identifier for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response for a 404 Not Found error in the POST transactions operation.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
